Ground Truth:
x^2 + y^2 - z = 4

Component functions:
  g1(x) = x^2
  g2(y) = y^2
  g3(z) = -z


Fitted Equation:
1.1317971 - 1.131793*(0.860952058774921*x - 0.00976911470650984)**2 + 1.1289909 - 1.1289996*(0.862725778817937*y + 0.0233873551934365)**2 + 0.834179430796007*z + 1.08898138716349 = -0.0000
R²_ortho = 0.1003

Component functions:
  g1(x) = 1.1317971 - 1.131793*(0.860952058774921*x - 0.00976911470650984)**2
  g2(y) = 1.1289909 - 1.1289996*(0.862725778817937*y + 0.0233873551934365)**2
  g3(z) = 0.834179430796007*z + 1.08898138716349
